commit_scope: Add a Form-native satsang flip witness cell that binds the agent board, satsang protocol, public-gate canary evidence, rollback receipts, dissent, silence, and ordinary-traffic boundary into one executable proof.

commands: COORD_AGENT=codex scripts/agent-coord.sh claim "satsang flip witness: form/form-stdlib/satsang.fk docs/coherence-substrate/satsang-circle.form evidence"
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-flip-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/satsang-flip-witness-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-flip-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/satsang-flip-witness-band.fk
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
observed_results: agent board protocol printed the claim/share discipline and satsang circle was already present as a live body cell
first focused source proof exposed a sibling-kernel divergence: Go returned 4031 while Rust and TypeScript returned 4095
the divergence was caused by using numeric sat-welcome directly in an and expression; making it an explicit equality check aligned all kernels
satsang-flip-witness-band.fk source proof returned 4095 with 1 ok and 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript
satsang-flip-witness-band.fk binary artifact proof returned 4095 with 1 ok and 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript
evidence validation, whitespace check, rebase, local PR guard, and stale PR checks passed locally
local_validation.notes: The proof makes the canary flip knowable as a witnessed native public-gate movement while preserving the exact boundary that ordinary no-header public traffic remains unflipped.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The native public-gate canary now has an executable Form witness recipe that uses the agent board and satsang protocol to distinguish treatment native routing, no-header fanout control, decision and rollback receipts, visible dissent/silence, 0/1/protocol/fail/stop/BMA markers, and an ordinary-traffic-unflipped boundary.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-flip-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/satsang-flip-witness-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-flip-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/satsang-flip-witness-band.fk

The band returns 4095 only when board protocol, treatment, control, rollback, ordinary-unflipped boundary, satsang survival, non-self-certification, visible dissent, dropped projection, choice markers, and witnessed canary state are all present.

phase_gate.reason: Focused local source and binary proof passed. CI, PR, and deploy verification are still pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/satsang-flip-witness.fk defines the canary observation, board protocol check, satsang witness fold, non-self-certification, reversible gate, ordinary boundary, and choice markers.
form/form-stdlib/tests/satsang-flip-witness-band.fk proves the witness returns 4095 across source and binary sibling-kernel execution.
docs/coherence-substrate/satsang-flip-witness.form records the high-level structure and recipes shifted by using the board plus satsang protocol.
docs/coherence-substrate/spec-registry-router.form links the public-gate canary evidence to the witnessed truth cell.
Prior public canary proof path: scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh observed X-Form-Native-Public-Gate treatment selecting native-kernel while no-header control remained fanout-python.
